message:
Sync beads issue tracker: close completed tasks, update status fields

Update .beads/issues.jsonl to reflect recently completed work items
including strict table type enforcement, upsert/ON CONFLICT support,
parse cache implementation, JSONB encoding fixes, VFS lock ordering
corrections, and various conformance improvements. Closed issues are
marked done with timestamps and close reasons updated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
